Name: Rolling condition field
Description: Dropdown with multiple conditions that specify rolling window periods
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
1.Yesterday
2.Today
3.Tomorrow
4.This
5.Last
6.Next
7.Before
8.After
9.Before the last
10.After the next
11.Week to date
12.Month to date
13Quarter to date
14.Year to date
Error State: NA - It will always have a value

Name: Number field
Description: Text field that will always be a positive none 0 integer (natural number). The field should automatically validate itself
Dynamic Behavior: If the shortcut selected is anything apart from last quarter or last year this field will not be present.
Error State: This field will need to be validated for any non natural number and will automatically switch to nearest natural number and closest to any decimal entered or should prevent users from entering any decimal or negative values

Name: Time period field
Description: Dropdown field that will have multiple values to choose the time period
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
1.Second(s)s
2.Min
3.Hour(s)
4.Day
5.Week
6.Month
7.Quarter
8.Year(s)
Error State: NA - It will always have a value

Name: Shortcut keywords
Description: Selectable chips that are predefined time period configurations.
Dynamic Behavior:
Can have any of the below values
1.Last quarter
2.Last year
3.Week to Date
4.Month to Date
5.Quarter to date
6.Year to date
As the user changes the selection of these chips the fields above them get changed. For last year and last quarter, it will have 3 fields as show. For W/M/Q/Y to Date the fields above will have the start date and end date set as per the shortcut selected that the user can change. If the user chooses a different date then the chip selection goes away.
Example:
Error State:
If user chooses a different date that does not correspond to the shortcut time period selected then it gets unselected
The dates themselves need to be validated and field level error is shown as below

Name: Reset link
Description: The tertiary icon , Reset link will reset the conditions configured in all segments to its default value
Dynamic Behavior: Whatever the segment the user is currently in when they click on the reset link it will reset the condition in that segment to its default value
